reasoning: The Lean signature universally quantifies over any group G and elements a, b : G, and asserts equality of the subgroup closures of {a, b} and {b*a*b^2, b*a*b^3}. This is exactly the informal claim that a, b generate the same subgroup as bab², bab³. The types (arbitrary `Group G`, elements in G), the objects (`Subgroup.closure` of the respective two-element sets), and the conclusion (equality of subgroups) all match the informal reading. No hypotheses are added or dropped, and neither direction of the equality is strengthened or weakened.
